creator: gabor@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Hello Richard, 

I saw the mails on the mailing lists, and have found out that this is a 
commercial product and is supposed to be added to the website to our 
Commercial Software Vendors list. I added your product there, you will 
notice the change some hours later, when our pages have been rebuilt 
from the repository. 

Regards, 
Gabor
